name: @ehrbase-ui/openehr-its-rest
description: openEHR ITS-REST 1.0.3 — the REST surface EHRbase 2.31.0 implements. Zod schemas generated by orval from the official openEHR OAS specs (vendored in ./openapi, pinned by commit). Self-contained generation; the BFF proxy validates responses against these schemas (docs/architecture.md §15).
